mapper.select:
select c.*, e.name masterName from clazz c left join emp e on c.master_id = e.id
and c.id = #{id}
and c.name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
and c.room like concat('%', #{room}, '%')
and e.name like concat('%', #{masterName}, '%')
and c.create_time between #{beginDate} and #{endDate}
order by c.update_time desc
mapper.delete:
delete from clazz where id in
#{id}
mapper.insert: insert into clazz(name, room, begin_date, end_date, master_id, subject, create_time, update_time) values(#{name}, #{room}, #{beginDate}, #{endDate}, #{masterId}, #{subject}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
